title: The Swimming Pool
writer: Alain Page, Jean-Claude Carrière, Jacques Deray
actors: Alain Delon, Romy Schneider, Maurice Ronet
plot: Jean-Paul and Marianne spend lazy holidays at their villa in idyllic Southern France. However when Harry and his attractive young daughter Penelope show up, the dreamy summer days are suddenly filled with unspoken tension and jeal...
